label: Thing
description: Defines an item, pawn, building, plant, projectile, mote, or other concrete game object.

thingClass.label: Thing class
thingClass.description: Fully qualified C# class name used to instantiate this thing at runtime.

category.label: Category
category.description: Broad classification controlling how the game treats this thing.

tickerType.label: Ticker type
tickerType.description: Controls how frequently this thing's Tick method is called.

stackLimit.label: Stack limit
stackLimit.description: Maximum number of instances that can occupy a single inventory or ground stack.

size.label: Size
size.description: Footprint in cells as (x, z). Defaults to 1x1.

destroyable.label: Destroyable
destroyable.description: Whether this thing can be destroyed by damage or player action.

rotatable.label: Rotatable
rotatable.description: Whether the player can rotate this thing during placement.

smallVolume.label: Small volume
smallVolume.description: If true, many of these items fit in a single stack slot when counted for caravan weight.

useHitPoints.label: Use hit points
useHitPoints.description: Whether this thing tracks hit points and can be damaged.

receivesSignals.label: Receives signals
receivesSignals.description: If true, this thing can receive signals sent by trip wires and other signal sources.

comps.label: Components
comps.description: List of CompProperties objects that attach modular behaviors. Each item usually specifies a Class attribute.

virtualDefs.label: Virtual defs
virtualDefs.description: ThingDef references that are virtually inherited by this def for XML patching purposes.

virtualDefParent.label: Virtual def parent
virtualDefParent.description: ThingDef reference used as a virtual parent for inheriting XML fields.

devNote.label: Dev note
devNote.description: Internal developer note attached to this def. Not visible in-game.

killedLeavingsRanges.label: Killed leavings ranges
killedLeavingsRanges.description: Named map of ThingDef to count range dropped when this thing is killed. Child names are ThingDef defNames.

killedLeavings.label: Killed leavings
killedLeavings.description: Named map of ThingDef to count dropped when this thing is killed. Child names are ThingDef defNames.

killedLeavingsPlayerHostile.label: Killed leavings (player hostile)
killedLeavingsPlayerHostile.description: Named map of leavings dropped when this thing is killed by a player-hostile faction.

killedLeavingsChance.label: Killed leavings chance
killedLeavingsChance.description: Probability (0–1) that killedLeavings are actually dropped on death.

forceLeavingsAllowed.label: Force leavings allowed
forceLeavingsAllowed.description: If true, leavings are always dropped even when they normally would not be.

butcherProducts.label: Butcher products
butcherProducts.description: Named map of ThingDef to count produced when this thing is butchered. Child names are ThingDef defNames.

smeltProducts.label: Smelt products
smeltProducts.description: Named map of ThingDef to count produced when this thing is smelted. Child names are ThingDef defNames.

smeltable.label: Smeltable
smeltable.description: Whether this thing can be smelted in a electric smelter for materials.

burnableByRecipe.label: Burnable by recipe
burnableByRecipe.description: Whether this thing can be used as fuel in a campfire or similar recipe.

randomizeRotationOnSpawn.label: Randomize rotation on spawn
randomizeRotationOnSpawn.description: If true, this thing is given a random rotation when spawned on the map.

damageMultipliers.label: Damage multipliers
damageMultipliers.description: List of damage type multipliers applied when this thing takes damage of the given category.

isTechHediff.label: Is tech hediff
isTechHediff.description: If true, this thing is a tech hediff (implant or prosthetic) rather than a standalone item.

recipeMaker.label: Recipe maker
recipeMaker.description: Properties controlling how this thing is crafted, including workbench, skill requirements, and research prerequisites.

minifiedDef.label: Minified def
minifiedDef.description: ThingDef used for the minified (packaged) form of this thing when carried or stored.

isUnfinishedThing.label: Is unfinished thing
isUnfinishedThing.description: If true, this def represents an in-progress construction bill rather than a finished item.

leaveResourcesWhenKilled.label: Leave resources when killed
leaveResourcesWhenKilled.description: If true, this thing drops its construction materials when destroyed.

slagDef.label: Slag def
slagDef.description: ThingDef spawned as slag when this thing is destroyed by fire or extreme damage.

isFrameInt.label: Is frame (internal)
isFrameInt.description: Internal flag set on automatically generated blueprint and frame defs. Do not set manually.

multipleInteractionCellOffsets.label: Multiple interaction cell offsets
multipleInteractionCellOffsets.description: List of additional interaction cell offsets when this thing supports more than one interaction position.

interactionCellOffset.label: Interaction cell offset
interactionCellOffset.description: Offset from the thing's origin to its primary interaction cell in (x, y, z) coordinates.

hasInteractionCell.label: Has interaction cell
hasInteractionCell.description: Whether this thing has a designated cell where pawns stand to interact with it.

interactionCellIcon.label: Interaction cell icon
interactionCellIcon.description: ThingDef whose graphic is drawn at the interaction cell when a pawn selects a job at this thing.

interactionCellIconReverse.label: Interaction cell icon reverse
interactionCellIconReverse.description: If true, the interaction cell icon is flipped to face the opposite direction.

filthLeaving.label: Filth leaving
filthLeaving.description: ThingDef spawned as filth when a pawn walks through or interacts with this thing.

forceDebugSpawnable.label: Force debug spawnable
forceDebugSpawnable.description: If true, this thing always appears in the dev mode spawn menu even if normally excluded.

intricate.label: Intricate
intricate.description: If true, this thing is considered intricate for the purposes of art generation and descriptions.

scatterableOnMapGen.label: Scatterable on map gen
scatterableOnMapGen.description: Whether the map generator can scatter this thing randomly on newly generated maps.

deepCommonality.label: Deep commonality
deepCommonality.description: Relative frequency with which this resource appears in deep drill deposits.

deepCountPerCell.label: Deep count per cell
deepCountPerCell.description: Number of this resource found per drill cell when mining a deep deposit.

deepCountPerPortion.label: Deep count per portion
deepCountPerPortion.description: Number of this resource extracted per drill operation.

deepLumpSizeRange.label: Deep lump size range
deepLumpSizeRange.description: Integer range for the size of a deep resource lump, expressed as min~max.

generateCommonality.label: Generate commonality
generateCommonality.description: Relative frequency with which this thing appears in world-gen surface scatter.

generateAllowChance.label: Generate allow chance
generateAllowChance.description: Per-candidate probability that a world-gen scatter attempt actually places this thing.

canOverlapZones.label: Can overlap zones
canOverlapZones.description: If true, this thing can exist inside zone areas without blocking them. Private in source but present in shipped XML.

startingHpRange.label: Starting HP range
startingHpRange.description: FloatRange for the fraction of max hit points this thing starts with when spawned, expressed as min~max.

thingSetMakerTags.label: Thing set maker tags
thingSetMakerTags.description: String tags used by thing set maker rules to include this thing in generated sets (e.g. rewards, caravans).

alwaysFlee.label: Always flee
alwaysFlee.description: If true, pawns with this thing as their race always flee from threats rather than fighting.

recipes.label: Recipes
recipes.description: RecipeDef references for recipes that can be performed at this building.

messageOnDeteriorateInStorage.label: Message on deteriorate in storage
messageOnDeteriorateInStorage.description: If true, the game shows a deterioration warning message when this item degrades in a stockpile.

deteriorateFromEnvironmentalEffects.label: Deteriorate from environmental effects
deteriorateFromEnvironmentalEffects.description: Whether weather and outdoor conditions cause this thing to degrade over time.

canDeteriorateUnspawned.label: Can deteriorate unspawned
canDeteriorateUnspawned.description: If true, this thing continues to deteriorate even when it is not placed on the map.

canLoadIntoCaravan.label: Can load into caravan
canLoadIntoCaravan.description: Whether this thing can be packed into a caravan.

isMechClusterThreat.label: Is mech cluster threat
isMechClusterThreat.description: If true, this thing can appear as part of a mechanoid cluster raid.

displayNumbersBetweenSameDefDistRange.label: Display numbers between same def distance range
displayNumbersBetweenSameDefDistRange.description: FloatRange controlling the distance window within which stack count labels are merged (min~max).

minRewardCount.label: Min reward count
minRewardCount.description: Minimum count of this thing that must appear when offered as a quest reward.

preventSkyfallersLandingOn.label: Prevent skyfallers landing on
preventSkyfallersLandingOn.description: If true, skyfallers (drop pods, meteorites) cannot land on this thing's cell.

requiresFactionToAcquire.label: Requires faction to acquire
requiresFactionToAcquire.description: FactionDef that must be present in the world for traders to offer this thing.

relicChance.label: Relic chance
relicChance.description: Relative weight controlling how often this thing is chosen as an ideoligion relic.

orderedTakeGroup.label: Ordered take group
orderedTakeGroup.description: OrderedTakeGroupDef that controls the order in which pawns pick up items of this def.

allowedArchonexusCount.label: Allowed archonexus count
allowedArchonexusCount.description: Maximum number of this thing allowed when starting an archonexus mid-game scenario.

possessionCount.label: Possession count
possessionCount.description: Number of this thing a colonist is considered to 'own' for mood and trait purposes.

notifyMapRemoved.label: Notify map removed
notifyMapRemoved.description: If true, this thing's comps and extensions are notified when its map is removed.

canScatterOver.label: Can scatter over
canScatterOver.description: Whether map gen scatter operations can place things on top of this thing's cell.

genericMarketSellable.label: Generic market sellable
genericMarketSellable.description: If true, this thing can appear in generic market listings even without explicit trade tags.

drawHighlight.label: Draw highlight
drawHighlight.description: Whether a colored circle is drawn beneath this thing on the map.

highlightColor.label: Highlight color
highlightColor.description: RGBA color of the circle drawn beneath this thing when drawHighlight is true.

drawHighlightOnlyForHostile.label: Draw highlight only for hostile
drawHighlightOnlyForHostile.description: If true, the highlight is only drawn when the viewer's faction is hostile to the thing's faction.

autoTargetNearbyIdenticalThings.label: Auto-target nearby identical things
autoTargetNearbyIdenticalThings.description: If true, when attacking this thing the game also targets identical nearby things.

preventDroppingThingsOn.label: Prevent dropping things on
preventDroppingThingsOn.description: If true, items cannot be dropped or placed on this thing's cell.

hiddenWhileUndiscovered.label: Hidden while undiscovered
hiddenWhileUndiscovered.description: If true, this thing is invisible until it has been spotted by a colonist.

disableImpassableShotOverConfigError.label: Disable impassable shot-over config error
disableImpassableShotOverConfigError.description: Suppresses the dev-mode error about impassable things not blocking shots.

showInSearch.label: Show in search
showInSearch.description: Whether this thing appears in the in-game search results.

bringAlongOnGravship.label: Bring along on gravship
bringAlongOnGravship.description: If true, this thing is automatically brought aboard a gravship when leaving the map.

dropPodFaller.label: Drop pod faller
dropPodFaller.description: ThingDef used for the falling skyfaller graphic when this thing arrives via drop pod.

dropPodActive.label: Drop pod active
dropPodActive.description: ThingDef used for the active (open) drop pod after landing.

preventSpawningInResourcePod.label: Prevent spawning in resource pod
preventSpawningInResourcePod.description: If true, this thing cannot be selected as a resource pod content by the scenario system.

pathfinderDangerous.label: Pathfinder dangerous
pathfinderDangerous.description: If true, the pathfinder treats cells containing this thing as dangerous for non-combat pawns.

noRightClickDraftAttack.label: No right-click draft attack
noRightClickDraftAttack.description: If true, right-clicking this thing while drafted does not issue an attack order.

gravshipSpawnPriority.label: Gravship spawn priority
gravshipSpawnPriority.description: Sort priority used when deciding which things to spawn first on a gravship.

replaceTags.label: Replace tags
replaceTags.description: String tags that cause other defs with the same tag to be removed when this def is active.

preventGravshipLandingOn.label: Prevent gravship landing on
preventGravshipLandingOn.description: If true, a gravship cannot land on or directly over this thing's footprint.

canInteractThroughCorners.label: Can interact through corners
canInteractThroughCorners.description: If true, pawns can interact with this thing from a diagonally adjacent cell.

graphicData.label: Graphic data
graphicData.description: Visual representation settings including texture path, draw size, and shader type.

drawerType.label: Drawer type
drawerType.description: Controls when and how this thing is drawn relative to the map mesh.

drawOffscreen.label: Draw offscreen
drawOffscreen.description: If true, this thing continues to be drawn even when its cell is outside the visible viewport.

colorGenerator.label: Color generator
colorGenerator.description: Color generator that randomizes this thing's tint when it spawns.

hideAtSnowOrSandDepth.label: Hide at snow or sand depth
hideAtSnowOrSandDepth.description: Snow or sand coverage depth (0–1) above which this thing becomes hidden. 99999 means never hide.

drawDamagedOverlay.label: Draw damaged overlay
drawDamagedOverlay.description: Whether a damage state overlay is drawn on this thing as its hit points decrease.

castEdgeShadows.label: Cast edge shadows
castEdgeShadows.description: If true, this thing casts soft directional shadows along its edges.

staticSunShadowHeight.label: Static sun shadow height
staticSunShadowHeight.description: Fixed height used for computing the sun shadow beneath this thing. 0 disables it.

useSameGraphicForGhost.label: Use same graphic for ghost
useSameGraphicForGhost.description: If true, the blueprint and ghost placement graphic uses the same texture as the real thing.

useBlueprintGraphicAsGhost.label: Use blueprint graphic as ghost
useBlueprintGraphicAsGhost.description: If true, the placement ghost uses the blueprint graphic rather than the constructed graphic.

randomStyle.label: Random style
randomStyle.description: List of ThingStyleChance entries controlling which styles can be randomly applied when spawned.

randomStyleChance.label: Random style chance
randomStyleChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a random style from randomStyle is applied on spawn.

canEditAnyStyle.label: Can edit any style
canEditAnyStyle.description: If true, the player can manually assign any available style to this thing regardless of ideology.

dontPrint.label: Don't print
dontPrint.description: If true, this thing is excluded from the map mesh print pass and is always drawn in real-time.

defaultStuff.label: Default stuff
defaultStuff.description: ThingDef used as the default stuff material when spawning this thing without explicit stuff specified.

killedLeavingsExpandRect.label: Killed leavings expand rect
killedLeavingsExpandRect.description: Number of cells to expand the scatter rect when placing killedLeavings around this thing's footprint.

minifiedManualDraw.label: Minified manual draw
minifiedManualDraw.description: If true, the minified form of this thing must be drawn manually rather than by the normal draw cycle.

minifiedDrawScale.label: Minified draw scale
minifiedDrawScale.description: Scale multiplier applied to the graphic when this thing is displayed in minified form.

overrideMinifiedRot.label: Override minified rotation
overrideMinifiedRot.description: Forces the minified form of this thing to display in a fixed rotation.

minifiedDrawOffset.label: Minified draw offset
minifiedDrawOffset.description: Position offset applied to the graphic when this thing is in minified form.

deselectedSelectionBracketFactor.label: Deselected selection bracket factor
deselectedSelectionBracketFactor.description: Scale factor for the selection bracket shown when something nearby (not this thing) is selected.

selectable.label: Selectable
selectable.description: Whether the player can click this thing to select it and view its inspect pane.

containedPawnsSelectable.label: Contained pawns selectable
containedPawnsSelectable.description: If true, pawns inside this thing (e.g. in a bed or transport pod) can be individually selected.

containedItemsSelectable.label: Contained items selectable
containedItemsSelectable.description: If true, items stored inside this thing can be individually selected.

neverMultiSelect.label: Never multi-select
neverMultiSelect.description: If true, this thing is excluded from drag-selection and multi-select groups.

isAutoAttackableMapObject.label: Is auto-attackable map object
isAutoAttackableMapObject.description: If true, hostile pawns automatically target and attack this thing when nearby.

hasTooltip.label: Has tooltip
hasTooltip.description: Whether hovering over this thing on the map shows a tooltip with its label.

inspectorTabs.label: Inspector tabs
inspectorTabs.description: C# class names (ITab subclasses) for tabs shown in the inspector panel when this thing is selected.

seeThroughFog.label: See through fog
seeThroughFog.description: If true, this thing is visible through fog of war.

drawGUIOverlay.label: Draw GUI overlay
drawGUIOverlay.description: Whether a GUI overlay (e.g. stack count label) is drawn above this thing.

drawGUIOverlayQuality.label: Draw GUI overlay quality
drawGUIOverlayQuality.description: If true, the quality level is shown in the GUI overlay above this thing.

resourceReadoutPriority.label: Resource readout priority
resourceReadoutPriority.description: Controls where this thing appears in the resource readout panel on the right side of the screen.

resourceReadoutAlwaysShow.label: Resource readout always show
resourceReadoutAlwaysShow.description: If true, this resource is shown in the readout even when the count is zero.

drawPlaceWorkersWhileSelected.label: Draw place workers while selected
drawPlaceWorkersWhileSelected.description: If true, the PlaceWorker overlays for this thing are drawn while it is selected on the map.

drawPlaceWorkersWhileInstallBlueprintSel.label: Draw place workers while install blueprint selected
drawPlaceWorkersWhileInstallBlueprintSel.description: If true, the PlaceWorker overlays are drawn while the install blueprint for this thing is selected.

storedConceptLearnOpportunity.label: Stored concept learn opportunity
storedConceptLearnOpportunity.description: ConceptDef that gets marked as learned the first time the player selects this thing.

uiIconScale.label: UI icon scale
uiIconScale.description: Scale multiplier applied to this thing's icon in the architect and recipe UIs.

hasCustomRectForSelector.label: Has custom rect for selector
hasCustomRectForSelector.description: If true, this thing uses a custom hit rect for mouse-click selection rather than its full cell footprint.

hideStats.label: Hide stats
hideStats.description: If true, the stats tab is hidden in this thing's inspect pane.

hideInspect.label: Hide inspect
hideInspect.description: If true, no inspect pane is shown when this thing is selected.

onlyShowInspectString.label: Only show inspect string
onlyShowInspectString.description: If true, only the inspect string is shown in the pane rather than full stats.

hideMainDesc.label: Hide main description
hideMainDesc.description: If true, the main description is hidden from this thing's info card.

alwaysHaulable.label: Always haulable
alwaysHaulable.description: If true, this thing is always eligible for hauling to stockpiles even without explicit hauling designations.

designateHaulable.label: Designate haulable
designateHaulable.description: If true, this thing can be manually designated for hauling by the player.

thingCategories.label: Thing categories
thingCategories.description: ThingCategoryDef references listing the inventory categories this thing belongs to.

mineable.label: Mineable
mineable.description: Whether this thing (typically rock or ore) can be mined by colonists.

socialPropernessMatters.label: Social properness matters
socialPropernessMatters.description: If true, leaving this thing on the ground in a social area negatively affects colonist mood.

stealable.label: Stealable
stealable.description: Whether this thing can be stolen by raiders or quests.

soundSpawned.label: Sound spawned
soundSpawned.description: SoundDef played when this thing is spawned onto the map.

soundDrop.label: Sound drop
soundDrop.description: SoundDef played when this thing is dropped by a pawn.

soundPickup.label: Sound pickup
soundPickup.description: SoundDef played when a pawn picks this thing up.

soundInteract.label: Sound interact
soundInteract.description: SoundDef played repeatedly while a pawn is using or interacting with this thing.

soundImpactDefault.label: Sound impact default
soundImpactDefault.description: SoundDef played when a projectile or other object impacts this thing.

soundPlayInstrument.label: Sound play instrument
soundPlayInstrument.description: SoundDef played when a pawn performs a joy activity on this instrument building.

soundOpen.label: Sound open
soundOpen.description: SoundDef played when this thing (typically a door) opens.

saveCompressible.label: Save compressible
saveCompressible.description: If true, this thing's save data can be compressed when many identical instances exist in the same stack.

isSaveable.label: Is saveable
isSaveable.description: Whether this thing is written to the save file. Set false for temporary or transient objects.

holdsRoof.label: Holds roof
holdsRoof.description: If true, this thing acts as a roof support and prevents nearby cells from losing their roof.

fillPercent.label: Fill percent
fillPercent.description: Fraction (0–1) of the cell this thing fills for cover and line-of-sight purposes.

coversFloor.label: Covers floor
coversFloor.description: If true, this thing's graphic covers the floor tile beneath it.

neverOverlapFloors.label: Never overlap floors
neverOverlapFloors.description: If true, floor tiles are never drawn overlapping this thing even if they normally would.

surfaceType.label: Surface type
surfaceType.description: Determines what kind of items can be placed on top of this thing.

wipesPlants.label: Wipes plants
wipesPlants.description: If true, any plants in this thing's footprint are destroyed when it is placed.

blockPlants.label: Block plants
blockPlants.description: If true, plants cannot grow in cells occupied by this thing.

blockLight.label: Block light
blockLight.description: If true, this thing blocks light from passing through its cell.

blockWind.label: Block wind
blockWind.description: If true, this thing reduces wind speed in its immediate vicinity.

blockWeather.label: Block weather
blockWeather.description: If true, this thing creates an indoor zone that blocks weather effects.

tradeability.label: Tradeability
tradeability.description: Controls whether traders will buy, sell, or ignore this thing.

tradeTags.label: Trade tags
tradeTags.description: String tags used by trader stock generators to include this thing in specific trade inventories.

tradeNeverStack.label: Trade never stack
tradeNeverStack.description: If true, this thing is never stacked when generating trader inventories.

tradeNeverGenerateStacked.label: Trade never generate stacked
tradeNeverGenerateStacked.description: If true, traders always spawn this thing as individual units rather than in stacks.

healthAffectsPrice.label: Health affects price
healthAffectsPrice.description: Whether this thing's current hit-point fraction is factored into its market price.

colorGeneratorInTraderStock.label: Color generator in trader stock
colorGeneratorInTraderStock.description: Color generator applied to instances of this thing when they appear in trader inventories.

verbs.label: Verbs
verbs.description: List of VerbProperties defining the attack modes available for this weapon. Private in source but present in shipped XML.

tools.label: Tools
tools.description: List of Tool entries defining the melee attack options for this weapon or pawn body part.

equippedAngleOffset.label: Equipped angle offset
equippedAngleOffset.description: Angle in degrees added to the carried graphic rotation when a pawn holds this weapon.

equippedDistanceOffset.label: Equipped distance offset
equippedDistanceOffset.description: Distance offset applied along the pawn's forward vector when rendering the held weapon.

equipmentType.label: Equipment type
equipmentType.description: Controls how this item is equipped. Primary means it is held in the hands.

techLevel.label: Tech level
techLevel.description: Technological era associated with this thing, affecting which factions use and trade it.

weaponClasses.label: Weapon classes
weaponClasses.description: WeaponClassDef references categorizing this weapon for pawn weapon preference traits.

weaponTags.label: Weapon tags
weaponTags.description: String tags used to match this weapon against pawn weapon-generation rules.

techHediffsTags.label: Tech hediff tags
techHediffsTags.description: String tags used by hediff generation rules to select implants that pair with this weapon.

violentTechHediff.label: Violent tech hediff
violentTechHediff.description: If true, the implants generated alongside this weapon are considered violent.

destroyOnDrop.label: Destroy on drop
destroyOnDrop.description: If true, this item is immediately destroyed when dropped by its holder.

equippedStatOffsets.label: Equipped stat offsets
equippedStatOffsets.description: Named map of StatDef to offset value applied to the carrying pawn's stats while this item is equipped.

meleeHitSound.label: Melee hit sound
meleeHitSound.description: SoundDef played when this weapon connects with a melee hit.

recoilPower.label: Recoil power
recoilPower.description: Strength of the camera shake applied to the player's view when this weapon fires.

recoilRelaxation.label: Recoil relaxation
recoilRelaxation.description: Speed at which the camera recoil from this weapon returns to center.

rotateInShelves.label: Rotate in shelves
rotateInShelves.description: If true, this item is rotated when placed on display shelves or weapon racks.

mergeVerbGizmos.label: Merge verb gizmos
mergeVerbGizmos.description: If true, all verb gizmos for this weapon are merged into a single combined gizmo button.

entityDefToBuild.label: Entity def to build
entityDefToBuild.description: BuildableDef placed when a pawn uses this item as a construction order (e.g. a building kit).

projectileWhenLoaded.label: Projectile when loaded
projectileWhenLoaded.description: ThingDef used as the projectile when this turret or launcher has been loaded with ammo.

ideoBuildingNamerBase.label: Ideo building namer base
ideoBuildingNamerBase.description: RulePackDef used to generate random names for instances of this ideoligion building.

entityCodexEntry.label: Entity codex entry
entityCodexEntry.description: EntityCodexEntryDef describing this thing's entry in the entity codex (Anomaly expansion).

ingestible.label: Ingestible
ingestible.description: Properties for food, drugs, or other ingestible items including nutrition, drug effects, and joy.

filth.label: Filth
filth.description: Properties for filth things controlling how they age, spread, and are cleaned.

gas.label: Gas
gas.description: Properties for gas things controlling dissipation, color, and effects.

building.label: Building
building.description: Building-specific properties such as facility type, storage settings, and bed stats.

race.label: Race
race.description: Pawn race properties including body size, life stages, diet, combat, and reproduction.

apparel.label: Apparel
apparel.description: Apparel properties including body part groups covered, layer, and stat effects.

mote.label: Mote
mote.description: Mote properties controlling fade speed, size, and movement for transient visual effect things.

plant.label: Plant
plant.description: Plant properties including growth rate, harvest yield, wood drop, and fertility requirements.

projectile.label: Projectile
projectile.description: Projectile properties including damage, speed, stopping power, and explosion behavior.

stuffProps.label: Stuff props
stuffProps.description: Stuff material properties controlling stat factors, appearance, and which categories this material fills.

skyfaller.label: Skyfaller
skyfaller.description: Skyfaller properties for things that fall from the sky, including shadow, speed, and impact effects.

pawnFlyer.label: Pawn flyer
pawnFlyer.description: Pawn flyer properties for airborne pawns launched by abilities or other effects.

ritualFocus.label: Ritual focus
ritualFocus.description: Ritual focus properties for buildings used as the focal point of ideoligion rituals.

ingredient.label: Ingredient
ingredient.description: Ingredient properties for things used as recipe inputs, including merge behavior.

portal.label: Portal
portal.description: Map portal properties for things that act as entry or exit points between maps.

canBeUsedUnderRoof.label: Can be used under roof
canBeUsedUnderRoof.description: If true, this thing can be placed and used inside roofed areas.

basic-item.label: Basic item
basic-item.description: Minimal item def with a label and stack limit.

item.label: Item
item.description: General item configuration: stacking, hauling, deterioration, trade, and crafting.

weapon.label: Weapon
weapon.description: Fields used to configure an equippable melee or ranged weapon.

apparel.label: Apparel
apparel.description: Fields used to configure wearable apparel.

ingestible.label: Food and ingestible
ingestible.description: Fields used to configure food and other non-drug consumables.

drug.label: Drug
drug.description: Fields used to configure a consumable drug. A focused alias of ingestible editing.

medicine.label: Medicine
medicine.description: Fields used to configure medical items, including ingestible medicine.

stuff.label: Material (stuff)
stuff.description: Fields used to configure a ThingDef usable as construction material.

ingredient.label: Ingredient
ingredient.description: Fields used to configure a recipe ingredient definition.

building.label: Building
building.description: Fields used to configure a normal or specialised building.

plant.label: Plant
plant.description: Fields used to configure crops, trees, and other special plants.

pawn.label: Pawn race
pawn.description: Fields used to configure a pawn race ThingDef.

projectile.label: Projectile
projectile.description: Fields used to configure a projectile fired by ranged weapons or other effects.

mote.label: Mote
mote.description: Fields used to configure attached, thrown, or other transient visual effect things.

filth.label: Filth
filth.description: Fields used to configure generic and specialised filth classes.

gas.label: Gas
gas.description: Fields used to configure map gas definitions.

skyfaller.label: Skyfaller
skyfaller.description: Fields used to configure shuttles and incoming/outgoing skyfallers.

pawn-flyer.label: Pawn flyer
pawn-flyer.description: Fields used to configure flight/launch effect Things.

ritual-focus.label: Ritual focus
ritual-focus.description: Fields used to configure a building used as the focal point of ideoligion rituals.

portal.label: Map portal
portal.description: Fields used to configure a thing that acts as an entry or exit point between maps.
